verdict.summary: The change is sound and fail-closed. PyYAML is pinned with hashes while forbidding unchecked sdist fallback, and the new recursive workflow scan covers job- and step-level `uses` entries, exempts only repository-local actions, applies the appropriate immutable-pin format to action and Docker references, reports every violation, and fails both on violations and on a vacuous zero-reference scan. Existing least-privilege permissions and action pins are preserved. No hostile reviewer-directed instruction was found in the diff.
